allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Use Loofah''s direct API instead of non-existent register_allowlist_entry

The method register_allowlist_entry does not exist in Discourse''s Plugin::Instance.
This fix directly modifies Loofah''s SafeList/WhiteList to allow the custom element
and attributes, which is the standard approach for Discourse plugins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix settings format and update Ember imports for modern Discourse

- Remove non-standard locale_default from settings.yml
- Use proper type: enum and type: integer for settings
- Update @ember/service import to modern syntax \(no inject alias\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Use standard withPluginApi instead of api-initializer

The api-initializer module doesn''t exist in all Discourse versions.
Using the standard withPluginApi pattern which is more widely compatible.

Also enabled data-show-error to help debug widget loading issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
